title: Rose Gold Glitz Happy Birthday Plastic Table Cover (137cm x 213cm) - Perfect for Memorable Parties & Events - 1 Pc
features: STUNNING ROSE GOLD DESIGN: Add a touch of elegance to any birthday celebration with our glitz rose gold "happy birthday" plastic table cover, featuring a gorgeous metallic sheen that effortlessly elevates your party décor.

PREMIUM PLASTIC MATERIAL: Crafted from high-quality, durable plastic, enjoy peace of mind knowing this stylish table cover is designed to withstand spills, stains, and messy party guests, ensuring a hassle-free experience.

IDEAL FOR MEMORABLE PARTIES & EVENTS: Make any birthday party extra special and unforgettable with this eye-catching table cover, designed to create the perfect atmosphere and backdrop for photos, cake cutting, and fun-filled gatherings.

EASY TO CLEAN: Cleanup is a breeze with our rose gold table cover! Simply wipe off any messes or spills with a damp cloth and you're good to go, saving precious time and energy for enjoying memorable moments with loved ones.

GENEROUS SIZE & GREAT VALUE: Measuring 137cm x 213cm, our glitz rose gold "happy birthday" plastic table cover is amply sized to accommodate most tables and party settings, offering incredible value for elevating any celebration with just one piece.
